summary: Tested portfolio backend (FastAPI) and frontend (React) end-to-end. All 5 backend pytest cases pass (root, contact create+list, contact validation empty/missing, status regression). Frontend: all primary flows pass — Hero loads with correct headline & CTA, CTA smooth-scrolls to About, navbar links scroll, 7 Journey milestones present, 3 Collections cards, FAQ accordion toggles (verified via cross-item switching), contact click-to-copy shows toast, contact form posts to /api/contact (verified network call) and shows success toast, empty submit shows error and makes no API call, mobile menu toggle works and closes after link click. No console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact email field uses str instead of EmailStr — emails like 'not-an-email' would be accepted (only min_length=3). Consider EmailStr for stricter validation if business requires.
GET /api/contact is publicly accessible and returns all submissions including emails/messages — should be auth-protected before going to production.
Backend uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan handler.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — this combination is rejected by browsers and is unsafe; restrict origins for production.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contact submission and status check via API tests (left in DB for traceability; safe to purge).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py covers /api/, /api/contact (POST/GET + 422 validation), and /api/status regression. Real frontend testid patterns: hero-cta-lets-disrupt, journey-item-{0..6}, faq-toggle-{i}/faq-content-{i}, contact-card-{id}, contact-copy-{id}, contact-form-{name|email|message|submit}, nav-{home|about|journey|collections|contact}, nav-mobile-toggle, nav-mobile-panel, nav-mobile-{id}. FAQ uses framer-motion AnimatePresence — add ~500ms wait after toggle before asserting data-testid presence.
